allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from db.database import init_db; init_db\(\); print\(''DB initialized OK''\)")
Bash(wmic process where "name=''python.exe'' and commandline like ''%uvicorn%''" get ProcessId)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:9123/api/wasapi/start -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""device_index"": null, ""tab_title"": ""Test Recording"", ""source_url"": ""https://test.example.com""}')
Bash(# Find and kill the running backend process tasklist.exe)
Bash(# Check which python process is the backend \(listening on port 9123\) netstat.exe -ano)
Bash(# Check library for the encoded track curl -s http://localhost:9123/api/library | python -m json.tool)
Bash(# Check the right API endpoint curl -s http://localhost:9123/api/tracks | python -m json.tool)
Bash(# Find the right library API route curl -s http://localhost:9123/openapi.json)
Bash(# Test if the file endpoint returns proper content-length curl -s -I http://localhost:9123/api/library/tracks/52605b6b-8d8a-4e37-a937-680d7ce8051c/file)
Bash(# Test with GET and get headers curl -s -D - -o /dev/null http://localhost:9123/api/library/tracks/52605b6b-8d8a-4e37-a937-680d7ce8051c/file)
Bash(# Test with a real track curl -s -D - -o /dev/null http://localhost:9123/api/library/tracks/49f1aa7c-944b-404c-ab2d-085e87121973/file)
Bash(# Check if range requests work \(needed for seeking\) curl -s -D - -o /dev/null -H ""Range: bytes=0-1023"" http://localhost:9123/api/library/tracks/49f1aa7c-944b-404c-ab2d-085e87121973/file)
Bash(# Check the UI dev server is still running and has the fix netstat.exe -ano)
Bash(# Check storage structure echo ""=== Storage directories ==="" ls -la /c/Apps/TGT/capture/storage/ echo """" echo ""=== Library files ==="" find /c/Apps/TGT/capture/storage/library -type f)
